name: @dev-panel/pi-ext-mcp-bridge
description: Pi extension: spawn every server in ~/.mcp-worker.json (or PI_MCP_CONFIG) over stdio and re-expose their tools to Pi as mcp__<server>__<tool>. Lets pi-driven agents (ephemerals AND Shelly-on-Pi) call plane / devpanel / pgvector / affine / playwright / glitchtip / telegram MCPs the same way Claude Code does.
